## Checklist

- [ ] Ran `markdownlint .` with no errors
- [ ] New files are in the correct directory per repo structure
- [ ] README.md directory tree updated (if adding/moving files)
- [ ] No PII, company-specific details, or credentials included
- [ ] Links to other files in the repo are correct and relative
